content.en:
Genki Pavilion.

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was shocked when he learned that Tongshan Great Ancestor had been killed by Ye Tian, and he had killed him in a few moves, and he had also severely damaged the other two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

You must know that the Copper Mountain Great Ancestor can transfer damage, and if you want to kill it in a few moves, it is very difficult, and only the top high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth stage can do it!

"After that Endless Ancestor broke through to the fourth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, his strength has increased too much!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor couldn't help but sigh.

In terms of strength, he is similar to the Great Ancestor of Tongshan, if it is against Shang Ye Tian, it is estimated that he will be killed within a few moves, and may even be killed in one move.

"You must not provoke this Endless Great Ancestor!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor muttered.

Of course, he is not afraid, after all, he is the Great Ancestor of Xuanqi Pavilion, and his background is not comparable to the Great Ancestor of Tongshan.

Xuanqi Pavilion also has a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and there are many hole cards, even if Ye Tian's strength is comparable to the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, Xuanqi Pavilion is not afraid.

As Ye Tian's deeds of killing the Great Ancestor of Tongshan gradually spread out, the forces of the entire Xuanqi Territory were extremely jealous of him.

Of course, they were not afraid of Ye Tian's current strength, but of Ye Tian's potential!

They originally thought that Ye Tian had been abolished last time, but they didn't expect to break through to the fourth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms so quickly, obviously because the foundation had been restored.

Therefore, Ye Tian, who is so demonic, naturally has a high probability of growing to the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the future, so he can't be easily offended.

In the following years, Ye Tian was practicing very calmly, without any disturbance, but some forces visited him, but he refused.

......

In the blink of an eye, the first year of the 30 million realms has passed.

Ye Tian's cultivation was still the fourth stage of a full-body tempering, and it was naturally not so easy to complete the second full-body refinement, even if he didn't lack resources, he couldn't do it.

this day.

When Ye Tian was practicing, he suddenly felt that the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor was shaking.

"What's the matter, the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor is actually shaking!"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, not knowing what was going on.

Immediately, he contacted the Blood Ancestor.

Although the strength of the Blood Ancestor is a little weaker, after all, he was once the pet of the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, so his knowledge is still incomparable to that of other Great Ancestors, maybe he knows the situation of this token.

"Blood Ancestor, do you know what the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor token shock represents?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Blood Ancestor didn't hide it, and replied: "Endless Great Ancestor, the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor is a chance, but even if the Ancestor with insufficient strength obtains this token, he can't get the opportunity, and if he forcibly participates, he will even fall." Like this, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor has issued hundreds or thousands of tokens in total, and he has not only issued tokens in the Xuanqi Realm, but also thrown tokens in other places similar to the Xuanqi Realm, and may even have thrown tokens in the Infinite Realm Ruins. With the token, you can enter a secret place to participate in the assessment left by Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, but what the specific assessment is, outsiders naturally don't know. And the Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor Token in your hand is shaking, which means that the place is open, and it is calling the token owner to come over. Of course, you can ignore this shock, but it doesn't matter. "

"What if it was in the past?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Blood Ancestor smiled and said, "It's very simple, just use an immeasurable blood gold stone to integrate into it." After all, it takes energy to activate the token, and you have to cross the Xuanqi Territory and pass through the Infinite Realm Ruins to get to that place, and you can't do it without enough energy. And an immeasurable blood gold stone can barely allow a great ancestor to pass. "

"Thanks for the reminder!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Endless Great Ancestor, although your strength is very strong, it is best not to go over, otherwise it will be easy to fall. There used to be a top-notch fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that had obtained a token, but it fell later. Only the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have the certainty of life-saving, and the strength of the fourth-stage is still too much worse. The Blood Ancestor reminded.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian didn't say much.

Danger is nothing to him, it's a big deal to lose a doppelganger.

......

"Where Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor set a test, even if there is danger, my copy body will not necessarily fall. Let's give it a try, and maybe you can get a great opportunity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the Blood Ancestor had never been there, so all the news was not necessarily accurate, and perhaps the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms would not necessarily encounter danger.

So, Ye Tian took out an immeasurable blood gold stone and integrated it into the token.

Airplanes!!!

The token began to release a brilliant light, and then enveloped Ye Tian.

Abrupt.

The light disappeared in an instant, and Ye Tian also disappeared.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian came to a strange place.

This is no longer the Genki Territory!

At this moment, he was in a majestic hall.

The temple was made of unknown materials and contained terrifying powers.

Ye Tian felt that even if he went all out, he was afraid that he would not be able to leave a mark on the wall.

Boom Boom Boom !!

A terrifying figure arrived here one after another, their shapes were different, some were humanoids, some were other forms, but each of them was very strong in cultivation, almost higher than Ye Tian.

"Fifth Stage High-Order Immeasurable Lifeforms!"

"It's another fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

"It's still a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

Ye Tian glanced around, the dozens of Great Ancestors who arrived were all in the fifth stage, and only one was in the fourth stage, but he had also completed at least nine or more times of full-body tempering.

Only he has the lowest cultivation, not to mention that he is in the fourth stage, and he has only completed one full-body tempering.

As a result, he attracted the attention of other Great Ancestors.

"Which realm does this Great Ancestor come from, he has only completed one full-body tempering, and such a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform dares to come here, isn't he afraid of death?"

"Forget it, what are you talking about with such an ancestor, you won't be able to see you in the future anyway!"

"It is estimated that I was attracted by the opportunity and benefits of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, but when I came here, if I didn't have the strength, I wouldn't be able to get any benefits, and I would even lose my life!"

These Great Ancestors were not optimistic about Ye Tian, and they all thought that Ye Tian would definitely die.

Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to these great ancestors, and just waited quietly.

Not long after, about a hundred Great Ancestors came here, and there were only three fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and the others were all fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

At this moment, the phantom of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor descended!
